Cli.MigrationAutomatic: Safely migratable legacy server data was detected and migrated before startup.

Cli.MigrationStepMissing: No safe migration path exists from data version {SOURCE} to {TARGET}. No data was changed. Use a server version that provides the required migration steps.
Cli.MigrationSummary: Migration complete. Database {DATABASE_FROM}->{DATABASE_TO} ({DATABASE_STEPS} steps); snapshots {SNAPSHOTS} ({SNAPSHOT_STEPS} steps).
Cli.MigrationWorldRebaselineRequired: The world substrate could not be restored automatically. An administrator must overwrite the world baseline.
Cli.UnknownCommand: Unknown command. Type help to view available commands.
Cli.Help:
Available commands:
  status                              Show server status
  players                             List players
  admins                              List administrators
  bans                                List banned users
  lock [reason]                       Block new logins; administrators are not blocked
  unlock                              Unblock logins
  kick <userId>                       Kick an online user and revoke the session
  ban <userId>                        Ban a user and kick them
  unban <userId>                      Remove a ban
  promote <userId>                    Promote a user to administrator
  revoke <userId>                     Remove administrator rights; the last administrator cannot be removed
  reset-password <userId> [password]  Reset offline login password; omit password to set it empty
  broadcast [options] <message>       Send a server notification
    --target <userId>                 Send only to one player
    --severity info|warning|critical  Notification severity; default is info
    --persistent                      Offline players will also receive it
  stop                                Stop the server

Not available from CLI: server baseline override, item prices, trap lists, and local game-data scans. Those require an administrator client to upload game data.
Cli.AdminRevokeFailed: Cannot revoke: the target is not an administrator, or this is the last administrator.
Cli.ShutdownScheduled: Notified {COUNT} online player(s). The server will shut down in {SECONDS} seconds.
Cli.ShutdownNoticeMessage: The server will shut down in {SECONDS} seconds.
